ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source_locator_id" INTEGER /* Source locator ID for the data point */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Correlation ID for the data point */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Function ID associated with the data point */,
  "pc_offset" INTEGER /* PC offset for the data point */,
  "diverged" INTEGER /* Diverged value for the data point */,
  "threads_executed" INTEGER /* Threads executed for the data point */,
  "executed" INTEGER /* Executed value for the data point */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time for the data point */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage for the data point */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage for the data point */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code for the data point */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message for the data point */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., log, metric, feedback) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_source_locator_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_locator_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., log, metric, feedback) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the data source */,
  "log_format" TEXT /* Log format of the data source */,
  "data_source_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function (e.g., login, search) */,
  "function_subsystem" TEXT /* Subsystem of the function (e.g., authentication, data retrieval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DevOps engineer, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_notification" TEXT /* Notification details for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
